tasks.task_goal: Attach baseboard along a living room wall by driving 2-inch finish nails
tasks.expected_outcome: Nails are driven flush and the baseboard is secured tightly and evenly against the wall
required_tool_attributes: weighted steel head for momentum transfer
smooth, flat, rigid striking face to avoid marring
handle length to generate swing speed and control
balanced head-to-handle alignment for accuracy
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, lightweight, deformable head (e.g., foam/plastic) that absorbs impact instead of transferring momentum
rounded, cushioned, or flexible striking face rather than a smooth, flat, rigid surface
no handle or a very short, flexible handle with poor head-to-handle balance/misalignment

tasks.task_goal: Seat wooden dowels fully in pre-drilled holes during flat-pack furniture assembly
tasks.expected_outcome: Dowels are fully seated without denting or cracking the wood
required_tool_attributes: dense, slightly compliant striking face to prevent surface damage while transferring momentum
sufficient head mass to deliver impulsive force
rigid handle for directional control
broad striking face for even contact
unconventional_tools: rubber-soled sneaker (use heel as striking face)
meat tenderizer mallet with a silicone oven mitt or folded towel over the head
plastic bottle filled with rice or sand, base wrapped in a dish towel
opposite_tool_attributes: very soft, low-density, highly absorbent striking surface that deforms and dissipates force
very low head mass (lightweight or hollow), unable to deliver impulsive force
flexible or limp handle (or no handle), preventing controlled, directional strikes

tasks.task_goal: Smooth and harden a copper bracelet by planishing over a stake
tasks.expected_outcome: An even, work-hardened surface with reduced ripples and uniform curvature
required_tool_attributes: polished, hardened convex striking face for clean impacts
moderate head mass for controlled momentum
rigid handle for precise strikes
well-balanced head for repeatable accuracy
unconventional_tools: trailer hitch ball used as a handheld striker
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, textured or concave striking face that mars instead of smoothing
very light or overly heavy, poorly balanced head that kills control
flexible, shock-absorbing handle that reduces precision and rebound

tasks.task_goal: Cut off a rusted bolt using a cold chisel
tasks.expected_outcome: The bolt is sheared along the chisel line and removed
required_tool_attributes: compact, heavy head to maximize impulse on short swings
small, flat, rigid striking face for accurate blows
short, rigid handle for control in tight spaces
hardened steel construction to resist deformation
unconventional_tools: adjustable wrench (used as a striker on the flat of the jaw/head)
small steel dumbbell (striking with the flat end)
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, soft, energy-absorbing head that dissipates impact instead of delivering it
large, domed or cushioned striking face that deforms and reduces accuracy
long, flexible or springy handle that whips and lacks tight-space control

tasks.task_goal: Mushroom the end of a copper rivet to fasten two leather straps
tasks.expected_outcome: The rivet head is flared evenly, locking the layers together
required_tool_attributes: rounded peen to spread metal plastically
hardened, rigid faces to transmit impact
balanced head for fine control
sufficient mass for effective momentum transfer
unconventional_tools: large ball bearing clamped in locking pliers
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant striking surface that absorbs impact instead of hardened, rigid faces
sharp-edged or flat face rather than a rounded peen to spread metal
very low mass and poorly balanced head/handle, reducing momentum and control

tasks.task_goal: Install a wheel bearing race evenly into a hub using a race driver
tasks.expected_outcome: The race seats fully and evenly without rebound marks
required_tool_attributes: non-rebounding head with internal shot to dampen bounce
dense, slightly compliant striking faces to avoid marring the driver
adequate head mass for high impulse
rigid handle for directional control
unconventional_tools: sand-filled sock secured tightly to a broom handle (shot-bag mallet)
plastic bottle filled with sand and taped to a short wooden dowel (makeshift dead-blow)
tennis ball packed with coins or BBs mounted on a wooden dowel (shot-filled striker)
opposite_tool_attributes: springy, high-rebound head with no internal damping (no shot fill)
very light, hollow head that cannot deliver adequate impulse
flexible or floppy handle that bends or whips under impact

tasks.task_goal: Reseat a paint can lid to create an airtight seal
tasks.expected_outcome: The lid is fully seated around the rim without deforming the can
required_tool_attributes: soft yet dense striking face to prevent lid damage
weighted head for momentum transfer
broad face for distributed impact
rigid handle for alignment and control
unconventional_tools: small saucepan with a folded dish towel over the base
opposite_tool_attributes: extremely soft, low-density striking face that collapses and absorbs energy
ultralight or unweighted head with minimal mass/momentum
narrow, point-contact striking surface that concentrates force

tasks.task_goal: Attach carpet tack strips around a room perimeter
tasks.expected_outcome: Tacks are driven flush and strips are secure at the correct spacing
required_tool_attributes: lightweight, balanced head for precise, rapid tapping
small, rigid striking face for tiny fasteners
magnetic face to hold and start tacks
rigid handle to transmit quick impulses accurately
unconventional_tools: steel tablespoon (using the handle end as a light tapper)
opposite_tool_attributes: heavy, unbalanced head with a large, soft striking surface
non-magnetic, slick face that cannot hold or start tiny tacks
flexible or floppy handle that absorbs and diffuses impact

tasks.task_goal: Crack cooked crab claws cleanly for serving
tasks.expected_outcome: Shells crack open without pulverizing the meat or damaging the plate
required_tool_attributes: lightweight yet weighted head for controlled impulse
broad, rigid wooden striking faces for distributed force
non-marring material safe for tableware
rigid handle for swing control
unconventional_tools: wooden pepper mill (use the flat base as the striker)
wooden rolling pin (hold a handle and tap with the barrel/end)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible striking surface that absorbs impact instead of delivering it
narrow, sharp or abrasive edges that concentrate force and mar shells and tableware
flexible or limp handle that bends or flops, reducing swing control

tasks.task_goal: Split a brick paver to size for a walkway
tasks.expected_outcome: The paver breaks cleanly along the scored line
required_tool_attributes: hardened, rigid striking face for crisp blows
chisel/peen edge to score the brick
sufficient head mass for effective momentum transfer
ergonomic handle for controlled impacts
unconventional_tools: framing hammer with a straight ripping claw
camp hatchet with a hammer poll
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant, or flexible striking surface that absorbs impact instead of delivering crisp blows
rounded, blunt edge with no chisel/peen for scoring
featherlight head and a floppy or slippery handle that prevents controlled, forceful strikes

tasks.task_goal: Drive a steel fence T-post into garden soil
tasks.expected_outcome: The post is embedded to the required depth and stands plumb
required_tool_attributes: heavy steel tube with weighted striking collar to concentrate force on the post top
rigid construction to withstand repeated impacts
side handles to guide vertical strokes safely
sufficient mass to maximize momentum transfer
unconventional_tools: cast-iron patio umbrella base with center pole hole
Olympic weight plate with grip holes
opposite_tool_attributes: lightweight, low-mass body that minimizes momentum transfer
flexible or soft construction that absorbs impact and deforms under load instead of staying rigid
no side handles or slippery grips that prevent safe, controlled vertical guidance

tasks.task_goal: Close gaps in tongue-and-groove laminate flooring using a tapping block
tasks.expected_outcome: Boards interlock snugly without chipping the edges
required_tool_attributes: hard, non-marring synthetic faces to protect edges
moderate head mass for controlled impulse
low-rebound behavior for precise seating
rigid handle for accurate aim
unconventional_tools: plastic water bottle filled with sand or rice (DIY dead-blow)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft or abrasive/metal striking faces that mar or deform laminate edges
very light head mass that cannot deliver a controlled impulse
high-rebound, bouncy striking behavior that reduces seating precision

tasks.task_goal: Set a brass grommet in a canvas tarp using a die set
tasks.expected_outcome: The grommet is rolled and locked securely to the fabric
required_tool_attributes: flat, rigid striking face to drive the die straight
sufficient head mass for decisive blows
hardened steel construction for durability
balanced head for repeatable accuracy
unconventional_tools: large adjustable wrench (used as an improvised hammer, striking with the flat jaw side)
heavy chrome-vanadium socket (used as a handheld striker with its flat end)
stainless-steel meat tenderizer mallet (using the flat face)
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant, or flexible striking face instead of a flat, rigid one
extremely light head with low inertia, unable to deliver decisive blows
non-hardened, easily deformed materials and/or an unbalanced, rounded head that causes glancing strikes

tasks.task_goal: Break up a small cracked concrete pad for removal
tasks.expected_outcome: The slab fractures into manageable pieces for disposal
required_tool_attributes: very heavy head to maximize momentum transfer
long, rigid handle to increase swing arc and velocity
broad, hardened striking face for durability
shock-absorbing grip for control and comfort
unconventional_tools: old steel car wheel with tire (used as a drop weight)
opposite_tool_attributes: feather-light or hollow head that cannot transfer momentum
short, flexible (rope-like) handle that limits swing arc and rigidity
soft, compressible striking surface that deforms instead of delivering impact

tasks.task_goal: Drive a steel wedge into a log to start a firewood split
tasks.expected_outcome: The wedge advances and the log splits along the grain
required_tool_attributes: compact, high-mass head for powerful, accurate strikes
flat, rigid striking face aligned to the wedge head
short, rigid handle for close-control blows
hardened steel head to resist mushrooming
opposite_tool_attributes: low-mass, hollow head that cannot deliver sufficient momentum
soft, rounded, compliant striking face that deforms or glances off
long, flexible handle that absorbs energy and reduces close-control

tasks.task_goal: Nail metal flashing while installing asphalt shingles
tasks.expected_outcome: Roofing nails are set flush at consistent spacing without damaging shingles
required_tool_attributes: milled, rigid striking face to reduce nail slippage
moderate head mass for rapid driving
integrated magnet/gauge aids for nail placement
ergonomic handle for repetitive impacts
unconventional_tools: 12-inch adjustable wrench used as an improvised hammer
D-cell Maglite flashlight (aluminum body) used for striking
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, soft, or flexible striking face that deforms and promotes nail slippage
ultralight or excessively heavy/imbalanced head that prevents fast, controlled driving
no integrated nail magnet/gauge and a slippery, non-ergonomic handle

tasks.task_goal: Straighten a bent steel L-bracket on an anvil
tasks.expected_outcome: The bracket is flattened and reformed to a true right angle
required_tool_attributes: flat face for general strikes and cross-peen to localize force
hardened, rigid faces for effective metal deformation
balanced head for precise blows
sufficient mass for momentum transfer
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, flexible, or shock-absorbing striking faces instead of hardened, rigid faces
no flat face or peen; rounded/spherical or knife-like edges that can't apply broad or linear localized force
extremely light, poorly balanced, or wobbly head/handle that prevents precise, high-momentum blows

tasks.task_goal: Install a bicycle star nut into a threadless steerer using a setting tool
tasks.expected_outcome: The star nut is seated straight at the specified depth
required_tool_attributes: flat, rigid striking face to drive the setting tool squarely
moderate head mass for controlled impulse
balanced head and handle for aim accuracy
durable steel construction for repeated impacts
unconventional_tools: heavy adjustable wrench (used as an improvised hammer)
metal meat tenderizer mallet with a smooth face
large Maglite-style flashlight (aluminum-bodied) used to strike the setting tool
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compliant, or padded striking face (rounded/deforming) instead of a flat, rigid face
very low-mass or severely unbalanced head/handle that prevents controlled, accurate impacts
fragile, non-steel head (e.g., rubber foam, plastic, glass/ceramic) that deforms or shatters under repeated blows

tasks.task_goal: Chip slag from a stick-weld bead before the next pass
tasks.expected_outcome: Brittle slag flakes off, revealing clean weld metal
required_tool_attributes: pointed and chisel peens to concentrate impact on slag
hardened, rigid head for repeated blows
spring or shock-damping handle for comfort and control
sufficient head mass to deliver sharp impacts
unconventional_tools: fireplace poker with a coiled/spring handle
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded, blunt impact face with no point or chisel edge, dispersing force instead of concentrating it
soft, flexible, deformable head (rubber/foam) that absorbs energy rather than delivering a sharp blow
ultra-light, hollow head lacking sufficient mass to chip brittle slag

tasks.task_goal: Collect a hand sample by splitting a small rock in the field
tasks.expected_outcome: A fresh fracture exposes the rock’s interior for analysis
required_tool_attributes: hardened, rigid blunt face for striking
pick or chisel peen to initiate fractures
balanced, durable construction for repeated impacts
sufficient head mass for effective momentum transfer
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, compressible striking surface that deforms and absorbs impact instead of transferring force
no pointed/chisel peen; smooth, rounded ends that cannot concentrate stress to initiate fractures
very light, flexible, poorly balanced construction lacking sufficient head mass and durability for repeated blows
